ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "primary_project_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary project type */,
  "sub_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub type of the project */,
  "project_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the project */,
  "start_date_actual" TEXT /* Actual start date of the project */,
  "finish_date_actual" TEXT /* Actual finish date of the project */,
  "project_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project site */,
  "co2e_calculated" REAL /* Calculated CO2e emissions saved by the project in metric tons */,
  "project_code" TEXT /* Unique code or identifier for the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "planned_start_date" TEXT /* Planned start date of the project */,
  "planned_finish_date" TEXT /* Planned finish date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the project */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the project */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was approved */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_primary_project_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_project_type_id") REFERENCES primary_project_types ("primary_project_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_site_id") REFERENCES project_sites ("project_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_status_id") REFERENCES project_statuses ("project_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_sub_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_type_id") REFERENCES sub_types ("sub_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "primary_project_types" (
  "primary_project_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primary project type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary project type (e.g., HVAC System Upgrade, Lighting System Upgrade) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the primary project type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent type, allowing for hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("primary_project_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_primary_project_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES primary_project_types ("primary_project_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_types" (
  "sub_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub type (e.g., Retrofit, Comprehensive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent type, allowing for hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES sub_types ("sub_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_statuses" (
  "project_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the project status (e.g., Completed, Install, Cancelled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sites" (
  "project_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the project site (e.g., Leonard Branch Library) */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Address of the project site */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym or short name for the project site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., library, school, park) */,
  "site_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for the site */,
  "site_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "site_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site */,
  "site_capacity" TEXT /* Capacity or size of the site */,
  "site_opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the site was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the site was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, project manager, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., contract, report, audit) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the document is the current active version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project note */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the note is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the note is private and should only be visible to the user who created it */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
